title: Meme Death
description: Spice up dying in Minecraft with new death sounds and messages !
body:
## About
Have you ever wanted to spice up Minecraft with some meme action or simply have a few laughs?
Meme Death does just that! By switching up the death screen in many different aspects, most notably **death sounds** as well as **death messages**, this pack makes dying in Minecraft a bit more "interesting" (for some :D).

All meme references are well-known and widespread. The death sounds' volume can be controlled via the ***Players*** sound group under the ***Music & Sounds*** category in the game's Options Menu. Try not to rage quit...

## Features
- 61 player [death sounds](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Wmtg9tjsKhMwAGZV9uoEL5Up1DgMCe1-)
- 97 custom death messages
- New player death subtitle
- New death screen GUI text

## Recommended
#### I recommend trying out these mods alongside Meme Death for an even better experience:

<details>
<summary>Give these mods a try!</summary>

- [Death Finder](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-finder) (Death coordinates in chat and on death screen)
- [Damage Vignette](https://modrinth.com/mod/damagevignette) (Adds a progressive red tint as health lowers)﻿
- [Enhanced Visuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) (Numerous immersive screen effects related to damage)
- [Deathpoint](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/deathpoint-4786775) (Stores lost items and XP in a barrel upon death)
</details>

---

## READ ME
This pack works for all spoken English languages.\
The following languages are excluded, as I consider them to be special as they are:

<details>
<summary>Excluded Languages</summary>

- *Pirate Speak*
- *Upside Down English*
- *Anglish*
- *Shakespearean English*
- *All other non-english language*

</details>

---

*Pack inspired by the [Retired Death Sound](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/retired-death-sound) resource pack. Be sure to check it and it's creator out ([@Pyromaniacal](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pyromaniacal)).*
